name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Annie persists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
It's no secret that 2017 is a trying time for women's rights. We face a Congress and President who want to restrict our reproductive freedom, and whose economic policies would be disasters for women in the workforce.
But I'm inspired by the hard work of people like Congresswoman Annie Kuster in the face of these challenges.
**I 'm proud to support her re-election campaign, and I'm hoping you can join me. It's important she ends this financial quarter on a strong note, so will you chip in for Annie?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Annie Kuster and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde96/2a380d31/18ca7579/fe92cd/3565289844/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNGFtayIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNjIxX213aDRhbWtfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjMifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4amk?refcode=e20170621_mwh4amk_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**

**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde96/2a380d31/18ca7579/fe92cf/3565289844/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNGFtayIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNjIxX213aDRhbWtfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVReUI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4amk?refcode=e20170621_mwh4amk_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde96/2a380d31/18ca7579/fe92c8/3565289844/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNGFtayIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNjIxX213aDRhbWtfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4amk?refcode=e20170621_mwh4amk_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Annie is a tireless advocate for women's healthcare, equal pay, and greater access to opportunity. And she's always willing to work across the aisle.

body:

| | | | Peter,

Have I mentioned to you how excited I am that the 11th annual [Defending the American Dream Summit](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=e3e41332e119b0f43f83cc572bf0e334cd0048facd0bb9e513423ef97cd4c1c324ef3498ca92253fc0e50e9fb4a14b060f9d70c61d7f86e6 "Defending the American Dream Summit") is coming to Richmond, Va., on August 19th?
You'll hear from top freedom advocates like **Virginia House Speaker Designee, M. Kirkland Cox** , who will discuss his positive vision for tax reform in our state, **and Farming Rights Activist Martha Boneta** , a fierce defender of Virginia's agricultural heritage!
You'll also meet liberty-minded activists from all over the state, celebrate our recent policy victories and sharpen your skills in our world-class grassroots training sessions.

**There are only a few spaces left! ****Don't delay - _[register now](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=e3e41332e119b0f41a07a858c431f998bdfeda9fd9658531a833f47a514bcf8f48ab47c53f677bfbe6d89d691045d6b67f7b13ec6cdd844d "register now")_.

****WHERE:** Richmond Marriott Downtown,500 East Broad St. Richmond, VA 23219**WHEN:** Saturday, August 19th, 2017[ ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=e3e41332e119b0f4cf0927a7cd83e6ed6bd349fb1f1cb502a95eccad47c12df765b58268e71a60a3cdbc66c45bd51385d89e38a25eef6940)

_**"Every year I look forward with great anticipation to the AFP Summit. If you believe in The American Dream, join me and other freedom defenders as we come together to be inspired!" **_**\- Martha Boneta**
This year's conference promises to be the best yet - it's an exciting opportunity you won't want to miss!
I look forward to seeing you in Richmond!
In Liberty,

JC HernandezVirginia State DirectorAmericans for Prosperity

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: What Jon Ossoff's results mean for Democrats >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7ad0/24c69fd9/d800f373/18e75187/4092995789/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE628N_digital_email_20170621_OssoffReportback_inact&source=WQEFE628N_digital_email_20170621_OssoffReportback_inact")
---

Peter,

Like so many Democrats, we'd been closely following the fight for Georgia's 6th Congressional District.

Democrat Jon Ossoff went up against an anti-choice extremist and aimed to flip a deeply red seat. He lost, but the fact that he was able to advance so far and come within four points of victory says something remarkable about what Democrats can do in the months to come.

See, there are 71 Republican-held districts around the country that are bluer than Georgia's 6th. If we could come this close to flipping this seat, there's no telling what we might be able to do next year.

**[Donate $3 to build on the momentum coming out of Georgia and flip House seats next year.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7ad0/24c69fd9/d800f373/18e75180/4092995789/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170621_email_OssoffReportback?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+build+on+the+momentum+coming&utm_campaign=WQEFE628N_digital_email_20170621_OssoffReportback_inact&source=WQEFE628N_digital_email_20170621_OssoffReportback_inact")**

Across the country, voters are standing up and fighting back.

That's where EMILY's List comes in: We want to run pro-choice Democratic women in as many vulnerable, Republican-held House districts as possible next year. If we're successful, we have a good chance of flipping the House.

So we're diving in headfirst. We've endorsed Katie Porter in California, Chrissy Houlahan in Pennsylvania, and Abby Finkenauer in Iowa, all of whom could flip seats. They're just the first of many challenger endorsements we'll be making this year, so stay tuned.

We're also rallying behind Stephanie Murphy, Jacky Rosen, and Carol Shea-Porter, three of our House women up for re-election next year. We can't take back the House if we lose their seats to Republicans.

Last night's results are encouraging and prove that Democrats can compete in deep-red districts. And, as Jon himself pointed out, his campaign was powered by women in his community who decided to fight back!

**Let's get to work and show Republicans we CAN take back the House:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/After-Georgia](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7ad0/24c69fd9/d800f373/18e75181/4092995789/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170621_email_OssoffReportback?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgAfterGeorgia&utm_campaign=WQEFE628N_digital_email_20170621_OssoffReportback_inact&source=WQEFE628N_digital_email_20170621_OssoffReportback_inact")**

Thank you,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7ad0/24c69fd9/d800f373/18e75183/4092995789/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170621_email_OssoffReportback?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQEFE628N_digital_email_20170621_OssoffReportback_inact&source=WQEFE628N_digital_email_20170621_OssoffReportback_inact")

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Imagine
body:
#
Team --
I want you to imagine, for a minute, what it would be like to have a Governor who would fight for the people who need it most. A Governor who had the courage to speak out, even when it's difficult. A Governor who we could trust to have our backs.
It's been two decades since we had anyone like that in the Governor's office in Florida. But with your help, and the help of thousands of other like-minded people who care a whole lot, I firmly believe that we can have that kind of leadership in this state again.
[**Watch our video explaining exactly how that 's possible, and join us in rebuilding Florida into a state that works for all of us, right here, right now:**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb331c/9e00690/4ad00001/2403791c/2954655608/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-june2017-lb?refcode=em20170621-lb")
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb331c/9e00690/4ad00001/2403791c/2954655608/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-june2017-lb?refcode=em20170621-lb")
I was raised in South Miami-Dade in an area called Richmond Heights. My dad was a construction worker and my mom was a bus driver, and they are the two hardest-working people I know. I was the first in my family to graduate from high school, and then the first in my family to attend and graduate from college. I know what it's like to interrupt the cycle of intergenerational poverty - thanks in large part to our public school teachers and the public trust that says we have an obligation to educate our children.
Both in my experiences growing up, and my experiences as Mayor of Tallahassee, I have witnessed firsthand the fact that nearly half of our households are struggling to make ends meet. Not because they aren't hard workers -- they are -- but because they don't have access to work with dignity.
In Tallahassee, I've seen our state leaders fail to confront Florida's biggest challenges: creating jobs at every rung of the income ladder, revitalizing our public education, addressing our climate change crisis, and expanding our access to quality, affordable healthcare as a right for all.
I believe, together, we can confront these challenges head on, and rebuild Florida into a state that works for all of us. I believe, together, we can overcome these odds, and take back the Florida Governor's office for the first time in 20 years.
But we can't do it without your help. That's why we're asking, and we need to know:
[**Will you join us in this movement by chipping into our campaign now?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb331c/9e00690/4ad00001/2403791c/2954655608/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-june2017-lb?refcode=em20170621-lb")
I know we can count on you -- thank you for everything.
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb331c/9e00690/4ad00001/2403791c/2954655608/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-june2017-lb?refcode=em20170621-lb")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

subject: Catastrophic damage

[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c261a/7377f838/3687d3f2/51fb1ef4/1856841756/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | **" It's been called one of the biggest success stories in Indiana health care, [and its future] is up in the air."**
\-- _Indianapolis Business Journal_ , 6/17/17 Peter,

Joe has always cared deeply about making sure all Hoosiers have access to affordable, quality health care, which is why he supported the Affordable Care Act. **In Indiana, the ACA funds our Healthy Indiana Plan, better known as HIP 2.0 -- an expansion of Indiana's Medicaid program that insures over 400,000 Hoosiers.**

Unfortunately, the American Health Care Act, which is being negotiated completely in secret by Senate Republicans, threatens to do catastrophic damage to HIP 2.0 and the Hoosiers who rely on it. That's just in line with a bill that kicks 23 million Americans off their insurance, allows companies to discriminate against people living with preexisting conditions, and causes hospitals and other healthcare providers to turn away patients.

**Joe 's doing everything he can to stop this disastrous bill, but everyone from the Koch brothers to Donald Trump's PAC is spending big to replace him with a rubber stamp for the Republican health care agenda. [Can you chip in $5 right now to make sure Indiana has Joe in the Senate to fight for our health care?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c261a/7377f838/3687d3f2/51fb1ef7/1856841756/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-hip?refcode=20170621nd&amount=10")**

The House version of the AHCA will undoubtedly hurt working- and middle-class Americans, but the version Senate Republicans are drafting in secret could be even worse. It could do catastrophic damage to HIP 2.0, causing working class Hoosiers to lose their health insurance or face catastrophic premiums.

Fortunately, the hardest working member of the Senate has our back. **Joe has said that he won't support any legislation that will cause Hoosiers to lose their care.** BUT Republican special interests and the Trump Administration have their sights set on unseating him. They're gearing up to make this the most expensive statewide race in Indiana history if that's what it takes.

Joe is going to do all he can to protect HIP 2.0 and health care for all Hoosiers. **[Will you pitch in $5 to make sure Joe stays in the Senate to defend our right to affordable health care?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c261a/7377f838/3687d3f2/51fb1ef7/1856841756/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-hip?refcode=20170621nd&amount=10")**
